_otto_notes.when: Only register when OTTO_COGNEE_ENABLED=1 and scripts/cognee-home.sh health returns ready
_otto_notes.preferred_transport: cognee 1.1.x exposes HTTP MCP on :8001 when started via `cognee-cli -ui` or uvicorn API on :8000
_otto_notes.legacy_stdio: cognee-local-stdio — use only when upstream ships `cognee-cli mcp` on your install
